overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a futuristic neon-lit urban plaza, ascending through multiple levels of a cyberpunk cityscape featuring holographic advertisements, glowing architectural elements, and dynamic lighting transitions.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor plaza with neon bar and seating

agents.ego_description: walking past the outdoor neon bar, observing NPCs seated at the counter

notable_agents.action: bartender serving drinks behind the neon counter

entered.detail: long counter with glowing cyan and pink neon lights wrapped around base
massive tree trunk rising through the center of the plaza
illuminated storefront sign with white lettering
large holographic advertisements on building facades
reflective floor panels emitting magenta light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic plaza featuring a neon-lit outdoor bar with patrons seated around a central tree. The player walks forward past the bar, with the AVANTE sign visible in the background and glowing pink floor panels reflecting the ambient neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with illuminated floor panels

events.description: ascends wide stairs and enters covered walkway with glowing green floor
ambient lighting shifts to dominant green neon from floor panels

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs and moving through covered corridor with glowing floor

entered.detail: corridor with bright green illuminated floor panels and glass walls
transparent facades with holographic displays visible inside

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a wide staircase into a covered walkway featuring a glowing green illuminated floor. Glass-walled buildings line both sides as the environment transitions from the open plaza to an enclosed, neon-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open terrace with benches and trees

events.description: exits covered walkway into open terrace area with natural lighting
begins ascending stairs with cyan neon edge lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through open terrace and ascending neon-edged stairs toward street level

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench looking at phone

entered.detail: planters with leafy trees providing greenery
wide staircase with glowing cyan light strips on each step

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a terrace with benches and potted trees. The player continues forward and begins ascending a wide staircase featuring prominent cyan neon edging, transitioning toward an upper street level.

events.description: reaches street level and enters open urban intersection
white vehicle drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the open street while navigating around pedestrians and observing traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving along the street from left to right

entered.detail: orange and white striped barriers with illuminated arrow signs
large building facade with Japanese text and English 'The Ryuki Hotel' in neon
outdoor seating umbrellas for street-level cafe

segments.scene_description: The player emerges at street level into a busy urban intersection with large digital billboards and passing vehicles. After crossing the street, the camera moves along the sidewalk past the Ryuki Hotel entrance with its distinctive neon signage and yellow outdoor umbrellas.

events.description: begins ascending stairs with illuminated cyan railings

agents.ego_description: walking past the hotel entrance and climbing stairs with neon railings to reach elevated walkway

entered.detail: glass doorway with red carpet and illuminated signage
small kiosk with glowing interior display
concrete stairs with bright cyan LED handrails

segments.scene_description: Moving along the sidewalk past the Ryuki Hotel entrance, the player approaches and begins ascending a secondary staircase featuring prominent cyan neon railings. A small food stall sits to the right as the path leads upward toward an elevated pedestrian level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with dynamic lighting

events.description: lighting shifts to purple neon as entering elevated walkway
ambient lighting transitions from purple to blue to green along walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway observing the city view and color-changing light effects

notable_agents.action: person leaning on glass railing looking down at street level

entered.detail: covered pedestrian bridge with reflective floor panels
transparent safety barriers with metal frames
overhead lighting that shifts between purple, blue, and green hues

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place on an elevated walkway featuring glass railings and dynamic color-changing neon lights that shift from purple to blue to green. NPCs stand at the railings overlooking the street below as the player moves through this futuristic pedestrian corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit outdoor plaza upward through the layered architecture of a futuristic cityscape. It begins by moving past an outdoor bar and a central tree under the glow of pink floor panels, before ascending a wide staircase into a covered walkway with a vivid green illuminated floor. As the camera exits the corridor, the scene opens onto a terrace with potted trees and leads up another set of cyan-edged stairs that emerge into a bustling urban intersection filled with digital billboards and passing vehicles. The movement continues along a sidewalk past the Ryuki Hotel and its yellow umbrellas, shifting upward once more via a secondary staircase past a small food stall. Finally, the path reaches an elevated pedestrian walkway where the lighting dynamically shifts from purple to blue to green along glass railings overlooking the city below.
